nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雅克·普什朗
nodes.summary: 雅克·普什朗是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Southern carmine bee-eater、马岛文鸟、Yellowish pipit，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Yellowish pipit
nodes.summary: Yellowish pipit（Yellowish pipit，学名 Anthus chii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于路易·皮埃尔·维埃约、雅克·普什朗，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellowish pipit (Anthus chii) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae, the wagtails and pipits. It is found in Panama and in every mainland South American country except Ecuador and Chile.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellowish pipit (Anthus chii) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae, the wagtails and pipits. It is found in Panama and in every mainland South American country except Ecuador and Chile.Remsen, J

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered common in Colombia, locally common in Venezuela, uncommon in Peru, and "common to frequent" in Brazil. Its range is believed to be increasing due to deforestation
